title: MUSIC VIDEO RENDER C — Sara+Eva food court party dance
reuseAssetNote: ONE 10s render, paired with Suno song via loopVideoWithSong.mjs to fill the music block duration.
prompt: Wide front-facing music-video shot — soft pastel gradient backdrop (sky-blue to soft yellow) with floating cartoon food-court icons (pizza slice, hot dog, ice cream cone, soda cup) gently drifting through the frame. NO scene, NO room. @Sara on the LEFT and @Eva on the RIGHT stand side-by-side, beaming, bopping in rhythm. Sara holds a slice of pizza like a microphone, Eva holds an ice cream cone like a baton. Sara waves the pizza, Eva waves the cone. Sara spins, Eva spins. Sara cone-clinks Eva's cone, Eva pizza-clinks Sara's pizza. Both jump on the beat. Both return to start. Movements are RHYTHMIC and LOOPABLE — clean cycle: wave → clink → spin → jump → return. Camera locked, head-on, kid-eye-level. Bright cheerful party lighting. Sara and Eva hum and sing along generically — no specific dialogue, no lip-sync. Designed to LOOP cleanly: same pose at second 0 and second 10. No audible speech, no music — silent render.
